results.title: Trovio Brand Dashboard : Communities love your brand - Our AI team finds them for you | Product Hunt | Derrick Showers
results.content:
Under the hood, we don't match on niche or vanity metrics like practically all other influencer marketing products. We analyze a creator's real content: the captions, the comments, the engagement patterns – even the video content itself – and map it to the communities where their audience hangs out. When a brand comes in, we're not finding them the mega-creator for their niche that they could have found on their own. We're finding the hard-to-find engaged communities their customers are already part of, and handing them the creators who own those conversations. The hard part is how incredibly hard these communities are to match and find. But that's the magic of what Trovio is able to do for brands (and as a result, for creators, too) [...] Building a startup is hard, and launch day is when support counts most. If you work for a brand, know someone who does, or just want to see what we've built, check out our launch on Product Hunt preview page: [...] Any feedback or support would mean the world to us! Thanks!!

Trovio Brand Dashboard : Communities love your brand - Our AI team finds them for you | Product Hunt

Jake Lee (JakeOnGrowth), graphic

Exactly! A smaller creator with the right audience can often do way more than a huge one with no real connection

results.title: Trovio For Brands: Communities love your brand - Our AI ...
results.content:
Search struggles to find those people. A search bar retrieves creators by the label they filed themselves under, and your customers don't live in one label. They live in communities: comfy-clothes people, no-time-to-eat people, always-in-transit people. One community pulls from a dozen niches, so a lot of the best matches never show up when you type a keyword.

So we built the Brand Dashboard around communities instead:

 Tell us about your brand and we surface the communities your customers are already in, the influencers they trust, and the reason each one fits
 Post a brief, set terms, and manage every conversation, deliverable, and deadline in one place
 Track what actually matters: conversions, not just reach

We'd especially love your take on: [...] Subscribe

Launching today

Trovio For Brands

# Trovio For Brands

Launching today

## Communities love your brand - Our AI team finds them for you

142 followers

## Communities love your brand - Our AI team finds them for you

142 followers

Visit website

Influencer marketing platforms

A nurse on hour ten of her shift sells your protein bar better than any athlete. Gone are the days when mega creators moved the needle on conversion. Today people buy from who they trust: small, close-knit trusted communities. Trovio finds those communities, and their influencers who actually use and need your product. - Influencers matched on community in seconds - Post a brief, set terms, and we handle the rest - Full analytics and conversion tracking Trust converts. Reach doesn't. [...] We'd especially love your take on:

 How community matches feel vs. your current discovery process
 The match that surprised you most, and whether the "why" made sense at a glance
 What metrics you'd want in the dashboard that aren't there

Ask us anything, and thanks for checking out Trovio!

Report

Artem Fedorovich

@andrew\_lukas We've paid people to do exactly this by hand, and the hard part was never finding communities, it was reading which ones would actually welcome a brand versus quietly resent it. How do you tell an engaged community from one that turns on outside brands the moment you show up?

Report

Andrew Lukas

results.title: Trovio - A Digital Agent for Creators
results.content:
Trovio hero illustration

# ADigital Talent Agent for Creators

Trovio is the agent for every creator, whether you're at 5K or 500K followers. Brand matches, pitch drafts, and a media kit brands actually open.

Get Your Digital Agent

## What You Post Matters More Than How Many Follow You.

What you post becomes a media kit. The themes become brand matches. Your voice becomes the pitch.

### The media kit that doesn't need a designer.

Pick a handle, pick a color, hit generate. Trovio builds your shareable media kit from the content you already make.

### Matched to what you post, not who follows you.

20 to 30 brands, grouped by the theme they'd actually fit. Three tiers: obvious fit, related overlap, and unexpected-but-defensible.

### Pitches in your own voice, anchored to real posts. [...] ### Pitches in your own voice, anchored to real posts.

Three drafts per brand. Voice extracted from your own captions. Every draft references a specific post that proves the pitch. Tune it, pick the channel, copy, send.

Yourdigital agent learns your content, your audience, and your journey as a creator — and gets sharper the more you grow.

$29/mo — includes all features, and you keep 100% of what you earn.

## Trovio Gets to Work in Three Steps

Connect your socials and your digital agent starts learning who you are, who your audience is, and how to help you make money.

Step 1

### Meet Your Agent

You

Your Agent

Connect your socials and share your goals. Your agent reads your content, studies your audience, and learns the voice you write in.

Step 2 [...] Your content does the heavy lifting

Your agent reads what you post, identifies the themes you're already known for, and uses those as the foundation for everything it does — brand matches, content strategy, outreach. You don't tell us your niche. We read it.

Personalized to your creator journey

Your agent learns your style, your audience, and your trajectory. The match we surface at 8K isn't the match we surface at 80K. Everything evolves with you.

Anchored to what actually worked

Every recommendation, every pitch, every match is anchored to real posts and real signals from your audience. No vague advice. No generic template with your name dropped in.

Your voice, not a template
